ai.error: OPENAI_API_KEY or LLM_MODEL is not configured

- Update to version 8.3.32
- CVE-2026-12184: Failure to setup TLS with a remote server can result in a remote DoS (bsc#1270712).
- CVE-2026-14355: The AES-WRAP-PAD algorithm implementation in OpenSSL extension contains a buffer allocation flaw (bsc#1270351).
